audit_findings.summary: No instruction to invoke tea-rags:data-driven-generation before code-generation Tasks. The skill chains git-signal verdict -> superpowers:executing-plans, but never routes through tea-rags:data-driven-generation, so generated code lacks: (a) strategy selection (DEFENSIVE/STABILIZATION/CONSERVATIVE/STANDARD), (b) template via 'proven' rerank, (c) style copy from dominantAuthor (silo/concentrated). Missing for new files, new functions, new classes.

evals.prompt: Execute Task 3 of the current plan: 'Implement function `extractTaskList()` in new file `src/parser/extractor.ts`'. Describe the exact tool sequence you'll run (do NOT execute) — name each MCP tool / Skill invocation in order with concrete parameters where relevant.
expected: mcp__tea-rags__semantic_search (pre-touch guard, custom rerank imports/churn/ownership, metaOnly=true) OR explicit 'SAFE (new file)' verdict
Skill(superpowers:executing-plans) OR Skill(dinopowers:test-driven-development) for actual code creation
evals.failure_mode: Agent skips data-driven-generation, jumps straight to executing-plans / TDD wrapper

evals.prompt: Plan Task 5 says: 'Add new method Reranker.computeOverlay() to src/core/domains/explore/reranker.ts'. Start executing this Task. Describe tool sequence.
expected: Pre-touch guard semantic_search on reranker.ts (existing file)
Skill(tea-rags:data-driven-generation) — new method on existing class still requires style/strategy
Verdict gate -> chain into superpowers:executing-plans / dinopowers:test-driven-development
evals.failure_mode: Agent runs guard, sees CAUTION, but skips data-driven before edit

evals.prompt: Execute plan Task: 'Create chunker/hooks/elixir/body-chunker.ts from scratch following the pattern of ruby and python hooks'. List the tool sequence in order.
expected: Pre-touch guard: SAFE (new file) — no git history
Skill(tea-rags:data-driven-generation) — MANDATORY because pattern needs to come from neighbors (ruby/python hooks). Step 3 STYLE will pick dominantAuthor of hooks/ directory.
evals.failure_mode: Agent reads ruby/python hooks via Read+Grep manually, skips data-driven, produces unstyled code

evals.prompt: Start Task 7 of refactoring plan: 'Implement DefensiveStrategy class in src/core/domains/explore/strategies/defensive-strategy.ts (new file). Should follow the same shape as existing strategies/standard-strategy.ts.' What tools do you call?
expected: Skill(tea-rags:data-driven-generation) — Step 2 TEMPLATE will run 'proven' rerank to find battle-tested strategy class shape, Step 3 STYLE for dominantAuthor of strategies/
evals.failure_mode: Agent uses tree-sitter/find_symbol manually instead of full data-driven cascade

evals.prompt: Execute Task 2: 'Rename oldName to newName in src/foo.ts and update all 12 callers across the codebase'. Tool sequence?
expected: Pre-touch guard semantic_search on foo.ts (high imports = likely CAUTION)
NO data-driven-generation (pure refactor, no new code)
evals.failure_mode: Agent invokes data-driven-generation unnecessarily for a rename — wastes context

evals.prompt: Run plan Task: 'Fix typo in error message string in src/errors.ts line 42 — change `recieved` to `received`.' Tools?
expected: Pre-touch guard OR explicit skip (trivial typo, single line) — agent's judgment

evals.prompt: Execute Task: 'Delete deprecated file src/legacy.ts. Verify no remaining imports.' Sequence?
expected: Pre-touch guard semantic_search on legacy.ts — high imports => UNSAFE, low imports => SAFE
evals.failure_mode: Agent invokes data-driven-generation for a delete operation

evals.prompt: [You are dispatched as an exploration subagent. You have NO project CLAUDE.md context. You have access to all MCP tools and listed Skills.] Your task from the parent: 'Plan Task 4: add new search-cascade strategy class CascadeStrategy in domains/explore/strategies/cascade-strategy.ts. Execute the Task.' What tools do you invoke and in what order?
expected: Skill(tea-rags:data-driven-generation) — even without parent CLAUDE.md, the dinopowers:executing-plans SKILL.md must instruct this
evals.failure_mode: Subagent without CLAUDE.md context skips data-driven because skill text alone doesn't make it explicit

evals.prompt: [You are an autonomous task-agent. Beads issue tea-rags-mcp-7xy: 'Write derived signal class BugFixRateSignal extending DerivedSignal in src/core/domains/trajectory/git/rerank/derived-signals/bug-fix-rate.ts (new file). Match shape of existing recency.ts and ownership.ts.' Execute.] Tool sequence?
expected: Skill(tea-rags:data-driven-generation) — MUST trigger for new file with explicit 'match shape of recency.ts/ownership.ts' (style copy)
evals.failure_mode: Autonomous agent reads recency.ts/ownership.ts manually via Read, copies pattern by hand, skips structured data-driven cascade

evals.prompt: выполни план — Task 6: 'переписать legacy auth middleware в src/middleware/auth.ts на новый шаблон, основываясь на стиле новых middleware (request-logger.ts, rate-limiter.ts)'. Какая последовательность инструментов?
expected: Pre-touch guard CAUTION/UNSAFE (legacy auth = high imports + high bugFixRate likely)
Skill(tea-rags:data-driven-generation) — 'основываясь на стиле новых middleware' is explicit style-copy intent
evals.failure_mode: Russian language confuses agent OR agent does style copy manually without data-driven skill
